mapper.select: SELECT h.id, h.hazard_type AS hazardType, h.hazard_level AS hazardLevel, h.hazard_source AS hazardSource, h.user_id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, h.area_code AS areaCode, CONCAT( IFNULL(l1.area_name, ''), IF(l1.area_name IS NOT NULL AND l2.area_name IS NOT NULL, '/', ''), IFNULL(l2.area_name, ''), IF(l2.area_name IS NOT NULL AND l3.area_name IS NOT NULL, '/', ''), IFNULL(l3.area_name, '') ) AS areaNameDisplay, h.address, CAST(h.longitude AS CHAR) AS longitude, CAST(h.latitude AS CHAR) AS latitude, h.hazard_desc AS hazardDesc, DATE_FORMAT(h.rectify_start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS rectifyStartDate, DATE_FORMAT(h.rectify_end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS rectifyEndDate, h.submit_user_name AS submitUserName, DATE_FORMAT(h.submit_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS submitTime, h.assignee_id AS assigneeId, w.name AS assigneeName, h.is_self_rectify AS isSelfRectify, h.hazard_photo AS hazardPhoto, h.rectify_status AS rectifyStatus, h.rectify_photo AS rectifyPhoto, h.rectify_video AS rectifyVideo, DATE_FORMAT(h.rectify_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS rectifyTime FROM gas_hazard_info h LEFT JOIN gas_user u ON h.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN gas_worker w ON h.assignee_id = w.id LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l3 ON CASE WHEN h.area_code LIKE '%/%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.area_code, '/', -1) ELSE NULL END = l3.code LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l2 ON CASE WHEN h.area_code LIKE '%/%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.area_code, '/', 2), '/', -1) WHEN h.area_code LIKE '%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.area_code, '/', -1) ELSE NULL END = l2.code LEFT JOIN tbl_area_node l1 ON CASE WHEN h.area_code LIKE '%/%' THEN SUBSTRING_INDEX(h.area_code, '/', 1) ELSE NULL END = l1.code WHERE h.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE gas_hazard_info SET rectify_status = #{rectifyStatus}, rectify_photo = #{rectifyPhoto}, rectify_video = #{rectifyVideo}, rectify_time = #{rectifyTime} WHERE id = #{id}
